findings.title: Potential IDOR (Method Swap (GET))
findings.description:
The endpoint returned a 2xx success code when accessing ID '1' via Method Swap (GET). Verify authorization.
Discovered sensitive key: \"email\":
findings.remediation:
1. Implement Ownership Checks: When accessing an object by ID, verify that the current user owns it.
2. Use Random IDs: Use UUIDs instead of sequential integers to make ID guessing harder.
3. Audit Logs: Monitor for sequential access attempts.
